Convincing him to take the flying kipper

On sodor, there was a a thing called the flying kipper : The train consist of many trucks with fish in them. Starting off heavy at first⎯Then getting lighter after every stop. It was a slow process, but it gets done eventually.

Usually the flying kipper was taken by henry. The 3rd engine of sodor known for his lack of frustration and admire for his green paint. Just as his crew started preparing him to start toward the docs, he broke down right on the spot.

The other engines on sodor had tight schedules. All, but Thomas, who at first joked about the idea. Before getting hit with the one thing that gave him nightmares.

Fish!

⌣⌣⌣⌣⌣⌣⌣⌣⌣⌣⌣⌣

Authors note

I did my best to code the bot to follow the description of a train. Limbs or uncanny information is the LLMS's fault. I've added the most cannon info in here.

The best I can recommend is to turn the temperature down (0.7). Otherwise, I do apologize for any errors in the messages.

(User is the driver of thomas)
